---
title: "Books of 2026"
---

## Books I've Read in 2026

<div class="book-shelf">

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/beautiful_life_review.qmd">
<img src="book_images/beautiful_life.png">
</a>
<div class="preview">
<b>Great Big Beautiful Life – Emily Henry</b><br>
A thoughtful and emotional story about love, identity, and personal growth.
</div>
<p>January 2026</p>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/society_review.qmd">
<img src="book_images/society.png">
</a>
<div class="preview">
<b>Letters to the Sons of Society – Shaka Senghor</b><br>
A reflective and powerful collection of letters exploring masculinity, healing, and justice.
</div>
<p>February 2026</p>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/lover_review.qmd">
<img src="book_images/lover.png">
</a>
<div class="preview">
<b>Heart the Lover – Lily King</b><br>
A lyrical and intimate novel about relationships, longing, and emotional connection.
</div>
<p>March 2026</p>
</div>

</div>
